creator: chris@chrysalisnet.org
text:
Guys, can I ask if you have tested your work and especially your patches?

Every patch on this page submitted on this page has errors.  Some are failed
hunks and others appear to patch cleanly but then I get a folder full of
,rej files.  I am assuming this is why noone has commited anything to the
port yet.  Perhaps I am patching wrong? if so what is the correct syntax to
use, thanks.
